markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance and resolve review blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Revision:** GrowthX will pause new submissions and rework all articles written before Jan 9. This is to align them with new product positioning (e.g., Context Studio) and competitive messaging from Hex's PMM.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**LLM Strategy:** GrowthX pitched comparison content as a key strategy for LLM visibility, using its new "Check That AI" tool to show how Hex's articles are already being cited by models like Plexity.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**Internal Alignment:** Peter Ryan is testing the LLM strategy's rationale to build a strong, unified case for Hex's marketing team, who are hesitant about creating competitor-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [**Personnel Transition:** Rachel will take over for Jessica Schimm next week. Matthew Alves-Hill will introduce himself to Rachel to ensure a smooth handover.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Blockers

  - [Recent content reviews revealed a misalignment with Hex's current messaging, blocking the publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** GrowthX was not provided with two key artifacts created after the initial calibration:](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
    1.  [**AI Competitive Guide:** A document from Hex's PMM (James) detailing competitor AI advantages and Hex's unique positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
    2.  [**Product Note Sheet:** Updated notes on new features, including the upcoming Context Studio packaging.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Resolution:** GrowthX will rework all articles written before Jan 9 to incorporate this new information. This saves Hex's team from line-editing outdated drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### LLM Visibility & Comparison Content

  - [GrowthX pitched comparison listicles as a powerful strategy to build domain authority and own the narrative in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [**Evidence:** The "JupyterLab vs. Jupyter Notebook" article is already being cited by Plexity, demonstrating the strategy's immediate impact.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [**Tool:** GrowthX's new internal tool, "Check That AI," tracks LLM visibility for Hex and its competitors, measuring how often each appears in key prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**Internal Challenge (Peter Ryan):** The goal is to build a compelling case for Hex's marketing team, who are hesitant about creating competitor-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
      - [**Core Question:** Is the goal to be an objective authority or to control the narrative? The answer dictates the required effort and nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [**GrowthX's Rationale:** Playing in the space is necessary to influence LLM responses. High-quality content is required to be cited, and citations drive traffic and signal authority.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Matthew):**](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Rework all content written before Jan 9 to align with the new Hex artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Introduce himself to Rachel to facilitate a smooth handover.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Hex (Jessica):**](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Pause reviews on all articles written before Jan 9.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Share the Context Studio blog post draft with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**Hex (Peter):**](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
      - [Add Rachel to the recurring sync invite.](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [Schedule a session with Rachel to define key prompts for tracking in "Check That AI."](https://fathom.video/share/__KC68CPBWLUryvLygCcBHdnk21QKskE?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
